source.section: Part 12 - Datalink & IFF > Datalink: TNDL (Tactical Network Datalink) Concept

steps.action: Press Sensor Control Switch AFT and confirm the AMPCD Selection Diamond is visible.
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch AFT — confirm AMPCD Selection Diamond is visible.

steps.action: Place the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) over a contract (we will select Colt 1-4 as an example, represented as Team Member D).
steps.voiced: Place the TDC over the desired contact.

steps.action: The Target Under Cursor (TUC) has its information displayed in the bottom right corner.
steps.voiced: Confirm TUC information appears in the bottom right corner.

steps.action: The boxed MEMB4 indicates that the target under the TDC is a datalink member No. 4.
steps.voiced: Confirm boxed MEMB label indicates the contact is a datalink team member.

steps.action: The unboxed DONR1 indicates that the target under the TDC is not a datalink donor, which makes sense since it is already is a Datalink Member. DATALINK TNDL (TACTICAL NETWORK DATALINK) CONCEPT Sensor Control Switch AMPCD Selected Diamond Throttle Designator Controller AFT/FWD/LEFT/RIGHT/DEPRESS TDC on Target Target Under Cursor (TUC) Data Block FA18: Aircraft Type CT14: Colt 1-4 Callsign 17.5: Remaining Fuel (17500 lbs) BRA 141/1: Bearing, Range & Altitude from You. Target is at your 141, 1 nm out Adding & Removing Participants to/from Team & Donor Lists
steps.voiced: Confirm unboxed DONR label indicates the contact is not a datalink donor.

steps.action: Let's remove Colt 1-4 from the Member List and replace the Team Member Slot No. 4 with Sting 1-1 (currently a Donor).
steps.voiced: To reassign a member slot, first remove the current member, then assign the replacement.

steps.action: Place the TDC (Target Designator Controller) over Colt 1-4. The boxed MEMB4 label indicates it is team member No. 4 within our datalink network.
steps.voiced: Place TDC over the member to remove — confirm boxed MEMB label.

steps.action: Un-select (un-box) the MEMB4 label to remove Colt 1-4 as a team member. Note that “D” letter has disappeared from Colt 1-4.
steps.voiced: Un-box the MEMB label to remove the contact from the member list — confirm D letter disappears.

steps.action: Place the TDC over the Sting 1-1. The boxed DONR5 label indicates it is a donor No. 5, but not a team member.
steps.voiced: Place TDC over the desired donor — confirm boxed DONR label.

steps.action: Un-select (un-box) the DONR label to remove Sting 1-1 as a Donor.
steps.voiced: Un-box the DONR label to remove the contact as a donor.

steps.action: Select MEMBR label (boxed) to assign Sting 1-1 aircraft as a team member participant. Note that “D” letter has appeared on Sting 1-1, indicating it is now Team Member No. 4. (Note: You can do this with all networked aircraft, and it allows you to dynamically configure) your network during a mission.
steps.voiced: Select the MEMBR label to assign the contact as a team member — confirm D letter appears.
